Katılımcılar

:

To follow up on my previous email I want to draw your attention that applications are open for the Training School in June (Scoping, Systematic and Integrative reviews on Community Mobility) – see the attached flyer.

Closing date for application is 21 March 2025.

The training school is perhaps more suited to people who are less experienced in completing and contributing to these types of reviews and will be more introductory level.

There is one systematic review planned within WG2 – Task group 2 as per my previous email. Anybody considering joining this task group might consider if the training would be beneficial, particularly if you have less experience contributing to these types of reviews.

For those who are offered a place in the training school it will be expected that you make significant contributions to the work of the action and proactively engage in the systematic reviews proposed within WG2 -Task Group 2.

Kind regards
